section_breakdown.1_person_resolution: Sharif A. Hidayat of Laytonsville. Disambiguated from PA state Sen Sharif Street. Age ~52 (42 in May 2016 per Daily Signal).
section_breakdown.2_biographical_foundation: Born MoCo to Egyptian immigrant parents. Muslim self-id. Jesuit HS (school not named in source). College not in record. Veteran self-id with no branch/dates.
section_breakdown.3_deep_news_history: 1999 MCPD academy (first Muslim officer); ~2009-2022 as 4th-district community services officer; 2012 ADL Shield Award; 2022/2024/2026 campaigns.
section_breakdown.4_political_track_record: Never held office. Stated positions on Thrive 2050 (opposed), housing mix (anti-rental), ag reserve (pro), upcounty (red-headed stepchildren frame), closed primary (opposed), SROs (pro-reinstatement), public safety (pro-police).
section_breakdown.5_controversies: None on record. Daily Signal lens flagged.
section_breakdown.6_listener_focus: 9 listener-flagged topics addressed. Most have 'unclear / open question' bottom-line because Hidayat has no voting record.
